issues_found: Source body was truncated; extracted text covers only front matter, table of contents, and introductory framework sections. Substantive content in Sections 1-5 and the risk assessments, numerical indicators, and forward-looking statements are not available for verification.
Published date (2025-11-07) is inferred from URL pattern rather than confirmed in extracted text; however, source content confirms November 2025 timeframe.
verification_confidence and llm_review.verdict are incorrectly set to 0 and 'pending' respectively despite the record having been generated.
macro_context field is empty; while the report focuses on financial system stability rather than broader macroeconomics, this omission should be noted.
human_review_reason: Source truncation prevents verification of specific risk assessments, numerical data, and detailed vulnerability findings. The record's summary and key_points are consistent with the extracted front matter, but the substantive analysis sections (Sections 1-5) are not available to confirm whether the record captures the most important findings. Human review needed to determine if: (1) the four vulnerability categories listed are comprehensive, (2) any significant risk assessments are missing, (3) the AI/algorithmic trading box content is adequately represented, and (4) whether supplementary access to the full PDF would materially improve the record.

corrected_fields.macro_context: The report focuses on financial system resilience rather than macroeconomic conditions. It does not provide new forecasts or policy rate guidance but rather assesses the build-up or reduction of vulnerabilities in the U.S. financial system.
